title: Savory Emerge
description: A savory and crisp Brazilian dish featuring free-range eggs cooked sous-vide for a halal-friendly post-workout snack.
instructions: Whisk together saugete and salt in a bowl.
Add black pepper and whisk until fully combined.
Brush the egg whites with the oil mixture using a brush.
Place the egg yolks directly into the sous-vide bag, seal it tightly, and cook for 20 minutes at 60°C (140°F).
Remove from sous-vide, season lightly with salt and black pepper. Garnish with chopped saugete if desired.
